sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 40:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 40:1
items.html: There are three phases in Dikna: 1. The first three corrections of Dikna, connected at the Rosh in the upper Lechi [cheek]. 2. Shibolet HaZakan, which is the phase of AHP that exit from the Rosh. 3. The other corrections of Dikna. (Inner Light, Item 19)
